title: helichrysum vernum
intro: Helichrysum vernum, also known as the autumn leek or yellow everlast, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum vernum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
